bird.name: Luapula cisticola
bird.summary: The Luapula cisticola (Cisticola luapula) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. Taxonomy The Luapula cisticola is monotypic.

locations.name: 刚果民主共和国
locations.summary: 剛果民主共和國（法語：République démocratique du Congo，簡寫為RDC）是位於非洲中部的國家，簡稱民主剛果（RD Congo）、剛果（金）（Congo-Kinshasa）。國家的陸地面積約234.5萬平方公里…

relations.subject: Luapula cisticola
relations.evidence: This species is found in eastern Angola, Lake Mweru (south-eastern DRC), Zambia, northern and north-eastern Namibia, northern Botswana and north-western Zimbabwe. Its natural habitats are tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland and swamps
